testcase.name: test_checkout_started_endpoint_exists
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration9_features.py:59: in test_checkout_started_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code == 200, f"Checkout started failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Checkout started failed: {"detail":[{"type":"missing","loc":["body","customer_email"],"msg":"Field required","input":{"cart_items":[{"name":"Test Product","price":29.95,"quantity":1}],"total_amount":29.95,"session_id":"TEST_SESSION_123"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/missing"}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
